name: RenderSettings.RenderingSources
summary: Rendering source (render directly from a NamedView or Snapshot)

enum_values.name: ActiveViewport
enum_values.summary: Get the rendering view from the currently active viewport (as in all previous versions of Rhino)

enum_values.name: SpecificViewport
enum_values.summary: Get the rendering view from the named viewport (see NamedViewport below)

enum_values.name: NamedView
enum_values.summary: Get the rendering view from a specific named view (see NamedView below)

enum_values.name: SnapShot
enum_values.summary: Before rendering, restore the Snapshot specified in Snapshot below, then render.
